title: New Torches x Bare Bones!
description: Makes New Torches appear similar to 24w33a redstone torch, and makes it Bare Bones!
body:
# New Torches x Bare Bones Resourcepack
![Image for description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5b8a1c897554c150e4e7cae7c7f6a92da237058_0.webp)

This resourcepack makes **all torches appear similar to redstone torch** intrduced in 24w33a. This resourcepack was made for **Trailer Reimagined modpack**, feel free to test it out! 
- **Trailer Reimagined:** [https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailerreimagined](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailerreimagined)
- **Discord:** [https://discord.gg/eWPtyYUCdy](https://discord.gg/eWPtyYUCdy)

You may freely use this resourcepack in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth/curseforge ecosystem.
